ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Paolini-Mori for (petitioner) Paul Lunardi.

The Court stated that this is a petition for a lost will and asked counsel what has been done to try and find it and who was the drafting attorney. Ms. Paolini-Mori stated that it was her father who prepared the will, that he is deceased, that it is their policy to give the original wills to the client, that the will was executed in their office in 1984, that Mr. Lunardi is her only heir and that the will was probably lost or misplaced. The Court asked if they have looked in safe deposit boxes. Ms. Paolini-Mori confirmed that they have looked, that they have been unable to locate the original, that the decedent was a long standing client and would have come back to them if she wanted to revoke it, that they believe the will was not revoked and that there has been a diligent search of the home and papers. The Court asked if a declaration had been filed with the court regarding what has been done to try and locate the will and that the issue is 6124 and the presumption. Ms. Paolini-Mori stated they do not believe the will was revoked, that the decedent would not have revoked it, that Mr. Lunardi is her only survivor, that he has helped her for many years, that there would be no reason to revoke the will and that there is no one here to present another will. The Court took the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary under submission.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Continued To Jul-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
